conditions.displayName: Cloud Run 5xx request count is positive

conditionThreshold.filter: resource.type = "cloud_run_revision" AND resource.labels.project_id = "${GCP_PROJECT_ID}" AND resource.labels.location = "${GCP_REGION}" AND resource.labels.service_name = "${CLOUD_RUN_SERVICE}" AND metric.type = "run.googleapis.com/request_count" AND metric.labels.response_code_class = "5xx"

documentation.content: Cloud Run returned at least one 5xx response for the trading-bot service over five minutes. Check the Cloud Run revision, readiness smoke, application logs, projection/reconciliation health, and deployment commit before enabling or resuming automation.
